I am building a strong, hands-on, practical foundation in offensive security, vulnerability assessment, and digital forensic diagnostics.

With deep research in IoT node security vulnerabilities and automated brute-forcing mitigations, I focus on transforming theoretical attacks into interactive, visual defense labs.

VITGuard // IoT Security Monitor

A multi-layered threat detection dashboard auditing smart telemetry networks. VITGuard monitors system signals and blocks malicious telemetry flows in real-time.
